1869210.name: Paladin's Oath Soundtrack
1869210.description:
Soundtrack for the Paladin's Oath Game.

Inspired by the music from games like Heroes of Might and Magic 3 and Warcraft 2 this compilation includes the 5 main tracks for the game exploration, battle, campfire and scenario success and failure scenes.

Genre: Fantasy, Arthurian legends, Angelic Choirs, Ominous.

Composers: Charles Wolf, Yohan Launay, Jordan Launay

MP3 includes full ID3 tags and album art.
